scripts.dev:safe: npm run db:generate && npm run build && node dist/index.js
scripts.dev:safe:tsx: npm run db:generate && npx tsx src/index.ts
scripts.build: tsc && (test -d src/generated || (echo 'Run npm run db:generate first (missing src/generated).' && exit 1)) && rm -rf dist/generated && cp -R src/generated dist/
